title: Develop capability that will Sum multiple Time Tracking columns
excerpt:

posts.author: baruchm (Baruch Moroz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Currently there is no accurate solution in Monday that can show the total time of multiple time tracking columns in a board:

  1. The Time Tracking widget can handle only one time tracking column.
  2. SUM formula is calculating static sessions thus if a given time tracking column is still running, it will not be calculated by the formula.

I would like to have a solution that will answer the need of showing the total of multiple time tracking columns including such that are running.

Thank You!
Baruch

posts.author: hulemaev (Karlo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I’m a developer from Croatia.
Would you be ready to pay for it if I built it?

Thanks for your reply!

posts.author: baruchm (Baruch Moroz)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the offer Karlo but I am looking for a native solution.

posts.author: MistyMK (AppBay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Advanced reporting board is now available for time trackers using Smart Timer and Team Tracking app which has the same look and feel as the native monday.com timer.

We had the same pain point with our service based business, detailed reporting is so important, so we got our dev to build a solution which we have now released to the monday.com marketplace.

We also built in the ability for the team to see LIVE who is recording time on what, this helps us to manage our remote team and re-delegate work as needed.

We have only recently launched so if there are any tweaks that would help it better suit your business feel free to add to the live chat and we will see if we can roll it out in the next update.
